Motel Management Course

Avoid costly mistakes in your first motel role.

Become a confident motel manager with practical motel management short courses. No prior experience required.

Proven in the field, supported by the industry, and built around a clear motel system instead of trial-and-error.

  • Certificate included
    Receive a certificate of completion when you meet course competency.

    Courses include a 10-day money back guarantee if it isn't the right fit.

    Designed for new managers and those with limited computer or motel experience.

As featured in Accom News

"How to Win your First 21 Days as a Motel Manager"

Motel Training Suitable for All Experience Levels

Inexperienced & aspiring motel managers.
Experienced managers looking to increase their capabilities.
Motel owners wanting to develop their on-site management team.

Self-Guided

$89

Course duration: 7–21 days No certificate

Self-guided access to the full course content. Ideal if you want a structured introduction to motel management without formal assessment.

Includes a Motel Management folder with real-world templates, checklists and documents used to run an independent motel.

Most Popular

Self-Guided + Testing

$189

Course duration: 7–21 days Certificate included

Self-guided learning plus structured assessments to validate your competency and award a certificate you can present to owners and employers.

Includes a Motel Management folder with the templates, checklists and operational documents used in real motels.

Priority Course

$675

Course duration: 7–21 days Certificate + 1:1 coaching

Starting a role and need to learn fast? Our Priority Course pairs you with an experienced motel manager for two full days of intensive coaching, with guided implementation support over 7–21 days.

Includes the full Motel Management folder of templates and real documents we use to operate motels day-to-day.

Meet your Instructor

Benjamin Douglas is the Lead Instructor at Motel Coach and author of The Essential Guide to Motel Management.

His background spans operational and commercial leadership across independent motel and hotel groups, progressing from frontline roles through to executive management overseeing 16+ motels, 10 restaurants, and more than 200 staff.

With experience across regional Australia, Brisbane, and England, Benjamin specialises in profit optimisation, OTA strategy, and practical implementation for independent operators.

Frequently Asked Questions

I have no experience, is motel management right for me? +
Yes - our training courses are designed to be beginner friendly and to get you ready for day one as a motel manager.
I'm an experienced manager - what can you offer me? +
For our experienced motel managers we focus on optimizing your operation with a combination of operational, marketing and revenue management strategies.
I'm not good on the computer will I cope? +
The systems used in motels are very basic. We can get you up to speed in a calm environment using a real motel system before you start your first role.
Do I get a certificate? +
Our base Self-Guided course does not include a certificate. The Self-Guided + Testing and Priority Course options provide a certificate of completion once you meet the required competency, and we support any students who need extra help to get there.
What if I don't enjoy the course? +
We totally appreciate that not all courses will suit each student. Our courses come with a 10-day money back guarantee. If you do decide the course is not right for you - we are still here and happy to answer any of your motel related questions and you will still be part of our community.
Can you help me with my motel? +
Yes, we provide tailored services for motels to increase their performance. Our key focus areas are optimization of existing channels, staffing, marketing and revenue management.

Download our Free Motel Guide

By submitting this form, you’ll receive the Motel Management Guide you requested, along with a short series of follow-up emails to help you understand motel management and your next steps. You can unsubscribe at any time.

Ready to Master Motel Operations?

Stop guessing and start yielding. Get the definitive 190+ page manual on Australian motel management, packed with hundreds of operational templates and checklists.
